featured.title: My First Year After Leaving Corporate Tech
featured.subtitle: An unfiltered reflection on the first 365 days outside the corporate matrix.
featured.description: A candid look at the first year after leaving corporate tech at 33, from health and purpose to the emotional reality of FIRE.

featured.title: The Brutal Truth About Passive Income: Why The Internet Is Lying To You
featured.subtitle: Passive income is real, but the way it is sold to you is a catastrophic misrepresentation of the suffering required to achieve it.
featured.description: An honest, hyper-personal breakdown of the four types of income, the nomadic journey, and why trying to separate your time from your money is the hardest active grind you will ever face.

featured.title: Do Not Pursue FIRE If You Cannot Pass This Brutal Test
featured.subtitle: A harsh, psychological reality check on whether you actually want early retirement, or if you just hate your job and love spending money.
featured.description: FIRE is not for everyone. Find out if your relationship with money, possessions, and purpose will make early retirement a dream or a living nightmare.

featured.title: From $40k Debt to Coast FIRE at 33
featured.subtitle: A personal case study of how a 9-5 helped me reach Coast FIRE in a decade
featured.description: A personal Coast FIRE case study showing how a 9-5 job, strategic saving, and consistent investing erased debt and built freedom.

featured.title: What Is Coast FIRE? Meaning, Formula, and Examples
featured.subtitle: The Coast FIRE blueprint: how to stop worrying about retirement and live for today
featured.description: Learn what Coast FIRE means, how to calculate your Coast FIRE number, and when you can stop saving for traditional retirement.

featured.title: What is Barista F.I.R.E?
featured.subtitle: The Complete Barista FIRE Blueprint: How to Retire Partially
featured.description: A detailed breakdown of the math behind Barista FIRE

featured.title: What Is Lean FIRE? Expenses, Number, and Tradeoffs
featured.subtitle: The Complete Lean FIRE Blueprint: How to Retire Early on a Modest Income
featured.description: Learn typical Lean FIRE annual expenses, spending ranges, portfolio targets, and the tradeoffs of retiring early on a lean budget.

featured.title: How much do you need to retire at 40?
featured.subtitle: A detailed breakdown of the math behind early retirement
featured.description: See how much money you need to retire at 40 using annual expenses, safe withdrawal rates, bridge accounts, and realistic savings targets.

featured.title: Lean FIRE vs Fat FIRE vs Barista FIRE vs Coast FIRE
featured.subtitle: And which is the right one for you?
featured.description: Compare Lean FIRE, Fat FIRE, Barista FIRE, and Coast FIRE so you can choose the financial independence path that fits your life.

featured.title: How to Calculate Your FIRE Number
featured.subtitle: A practical walkthrough of the 4% rule and personalization
featured.description: Learn how to use the 4% rule to determine precisely how much you need to retire. Complete with examples of target portfolios and Lean FIRE annual expenses.

recent.title: This one call helped me retire 4 years faster
recent.subtitle: 4 things I did which helped me make money quicker and fast track my way into an early retirement at just 33.
recent.description: How one compensation negotiation added $200K to my offer and helped speed up my path to early retirement.

recent.title: The Brutal Psychology of Why You Won't Negotiate Your Next Job Offer
recent.subtitle: And how this psychological trap could cost you $500,000+ over your career
recent.description: A breakdown of the cognitive biases—loss aversion, risk aversion, and the authority trap—that cause 55% of workers to accept the first number on the table.

recent.title: Can I Retire at 35 With $500k?
recent.subtitle: Every strategy simulated — from the safest withdrawal plans to real estate, dividend income, and geo-arbitrage. No hand-waving. Just math.
recent.description: Can you retire at 35 with $500k? See the math for U.S. costs, withdrawal rates, dividends, real estate, and geo-arbitrage.

recent.title: Do You Actually Need to Retire?
recent.subtitle: What if the question isn't 'how do I retire early' — but 'why do I want to escape my life?'
recent.description: What if retirement isn't the answer? A deeply personal exploration of what retirement really means, why we chase it, whether it's worth it, and what happens when you get there.

recent.title: Living Abroad on $1,100 a Month
recent.subtitle: How I cut my expenses by 82% without sacrificing quality of life
recent.description: A detailed breakdown of how I went from spending $6,000/month in New York City to living comfortably on $1,100/month through geographic arbitrage.

recent.title: How to Save $500 a Month
recent.subtitle: And retire years earlier than you thought you could
recent.description: Use practical spending rules to save $500 a month, invest the difference, and move your FIRE timeline earlier.
